title: Feature Request: Mirroring for Status Updates (Conversations)
excerpt: I use one board for a client list and then other boards for client tasks mirroring back to the client list board.  This works great except there is no way to mirror the updates or conversations in the tasks back to the c…

posts.author: dpeters35 (David Peters)
posts.cookedHtml: I use one board for a client list and then other boards for client tasks mirroring back to the client list board. This works great except there is no way to mirror the updates or conversations in the tasks back to the client. It would be great if the updates had a way to aggregate back to the client from the task boards.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
7 posts were merged into an existing topic: Shared or mirrored updates for connected items

18 votes have been moved. 4 votes could not be moved because their users already voted in the other topic.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all!

We really appreciate you patience with us, and sincerely apologise for the delay in updating this thread. At this time, we are working on a process to improve our responsiveness not only within the community but in specifically addressing feature requests, so really are grateful for your understanding!

As we pull together all the votes associated with this topic, we would love if you can redirect the votes on this thread, to the primary thread (most voted) here: Shared or mirrored updates for connected items - as we plan to close this smaller thread in an attempt to consolidate all votes, and better prioritise this feature request based upon the total amount of votes

Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! We just wanted to let you know that your feature request has been successfully merged into the existing feature request Shared or mirrored updates for connected items. By merging matching threads we are able to consolidate all the votes for better tracking and prioritization. It’s important to note that if you have voted on multiple threads under the same topic, only one vote will be taken in account. Thank you!
